summary: Full testing of PortHop app - both backend APIs and frontend UI flows. All 18 backend tests pass. All major UI flows work correctly including auth, captain signup, passenger signup, trip listing, interest expression, chat, notifications, and profile.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' appears 3 times on passenger home. Likely whitespace in JSX between View children.

action_items: Fix whitespace text nodes in React Native Views (passenger home / trip card components) - minor console warning
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well-structured, clean code with proper auth, no MongoDB _id leakage
API has proper role-based access control (captain-only trip creation, passenger-only interest)
Chat unlock logic is correct - passenger must express interest first
OTP mock is intentional per spec (123456 always valid)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all major flows work, minor console warning only

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Captain (phone: TEST_9000000001), TEST_Passenger (phone: TEST_9000000002), and test trips via backend tests. UI test data: Captain Test (8800001111), Test Passenger (7700001111).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified working. Captain flow: phone->OTP->role->setup->dashboard->post trip->view trips. Passenger flow: phone->OTP->role->setup->explore->view trip detail->express interest->chat. Chat messages send correctly. Bottom nav tabs (Explore/Alerts/Profile for passenger, My Trips/Post Trip/Alerts/Profile for captain) all working.

flows_tested.phone_otp_screen: PASS - PortHop branding, Get OTP button, OTP hint 123456
flows_tested.role_selection: PASS - Captain and Passenger cards with radio selection
flows_tested.profile_setup: PASS - Name input and photo picker button
flows_tested.captain_signup_flow: PASS - Full flow to captain dashboard
flows_tested.captain_post_trip: PASS - Port picker, date/time TextInput, seats stepper, price input
flows_tested.captain_trips_list: PASS - Shows posted trips with interest counts
flows_tested.passenger_signup_flow: PASS - Full flow to passenger home
flows_tested.passenger_home_search: PASS - From/To port picker, Search button
flows_tested.passenger_trip_cards: PASS - Captain photo (avatar), name, rating, price, seats
flows_tested.passenger_express_interest: PASS - Button changes to 'Request Sent' after interest
flows_tested.chat_screen: PASS - Opens after interest, messages send correctly
flows_tested.notifications_screen: PASS - Shows 'No notifications yet' (empty state) or notifications
flows_tested.backend_interest: PASS - express interest, get interests, confirm/decline
flows_tested.backend_notifications: PASS - get notifications, mark all read
